applications.title: Libreta de Dominó Boricua
applications.description: ¡Olvídate del papel! Anota tu dominó de la forma más rápida y boricua.
applications.longDescription: Libreta de Dominó Boricua es la aplicación definitiva para contar y registrar partidas de dominó tradicional de forma rápida y sencilla. Diseñada con un estilo moderno inspirado en Puerto Rico, te permite llevar el marcador oficial, gestionar jugadores y guardar el historial completo de tus encuentros para revivir cada victoria con amigos y familiares.
features: Anotación de Puntos en Tiempo Real: Lleva un control preciso de cada mano con un marcador dinámico y fácil de usar durante el juego.
Historial de Partidas Optimizado: Muestra un resumen de los últimos 3 encuentros para mantener la pantalla limpia, con la opción de expandir toda la lista mediante un botón interactivo.
Gestión Local de Jugadores: Crea, edita y administra los nombres de los participantes para personalizar tus partidas al instante.
Interfaz Temática Boricua: Disfruta de una experiencia visual elegante y fluida con un diseño responsivo basado en los colores tradicionales.

applications.title: MedRed: Medication Reminder
applications.longDescription: MedRem is a friendly, family-focused medication tracker designed to make managing health routines completely effortless. Whether you are tracking daily vitamins for yourself, managing complex prescriptions for a loved one, or keeping tabs on children's health schedules, MedRem brings everything together in one organized, easy-to-use space. By supporting multiple family profiles under a single roof, the app ensures that everyone's wellness journey is coordinated, visible, and never forgotten.
features: Color-Coded Family Profiles: Create distinct, personalized profiles for everyone in your care. Each profile is assigned a unique, vibrant color code that visually groups and organizes schedules, helping you quickly distinguish whose medications are due at any given moment.

Detailed Medication History Log: Keep an accurate, organized digital diary of past doses. The dedicated history timeline tracks exact timestamps and actions (such as taken or skipped doses) across all profiles, giving you a reliable record to share during doctor visits.

applications.title: The Numbers forcomputer
applications.description: This application is created so that children can practice addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division more interestingly.
applications.longDescription: The Numbers is a minimalist, number-focused educational game created by GitHub user ap0calip. Designed as a creative learning tool, it helps users practice basic math skills through interactive play. With a strong commitment to user privacy, it collects no personal data, making it a safe and focused environment for learners of all ages.
